name: tesla-energy
title: Tesla Energy
description: Monitor your Tesla solar panels and Powerwalls. View real-time solar production, battery charge, grid usage, and energy history.
author: chrismessina

commands.name: view-solar-production
commands.title: Solar Production
commands.subtitle: Tesla Energy
commands.description: View solar production, Powerwall, home consumption, and grid data by time period

commands.name: menu-bar-status
commands.title: Solar Status
commands.subtitle: Tesla Energy
commands.description: Show current solar production and Powerwall charge in the menu bar

preferences.name: verboseLogging
preferences.title: Verbose Logging
preferences.description: Enable detailed logging for debugging Tesla API calls
preferences.label: Enable verbose logging

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
